intro: Physaria hemiphysaria, also known as the Rocky Mountain Bladderpod, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage.
